summary: Owner/Cuenta Principal Mapping feature testing complete. Backend: 13/13 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features working - Ventas tab with Cuenta+Contacto columns, Top 10 Clientes shows owner names, Reservas tab demonstrates owner mapping (ALEX MEDINA as Cuenta, MARLENE CHAVEZ ESTEVES as Contacto). Security fix verified: all endpoints now require authentication (401 without token).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/detail requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/filter-options requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary returns top_clientes with owner_partner_id field
Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary returns top_clientes with owner_partner_name field
Backend: Summary top_clientes grouped by owner_partner_id (no duplicates)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/detail items have owner_partner_id field
Backend: GET /api/comercial/detail items have owner_partner_name field (Cuenta)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/detail items have partner_name field (Contacto) for audit
Backend: RESERVA data shows owner mapping working (owner != contact in some rows)
Backend: Cliente filter uses owner_partner_name for search
Backend: RESERVA summary has owner fields
Backend: RESERVA detail has both owner and contact fields
Frontend: Login with admin@stockdash.com/admin123 successful
Frontend: /comercial page loads with data-testid='comercial-page'
Frontend: Ventas tab shows KPIs (52,827 qty, S/ 2.67M subtotal, 5,381 orders)
Frontend: Top 10 Clientes table shows owner names (CLIENTES VARIOS, ANGELINO MONTANEZ, etc.)
Frontend: Detail table has 'Cuenta' column header
Frontend: Detail table has 'Contacto' column header
Frontend: Reservas tab loads with lower KPIs (248 qty, 11 orders)
Frontend: Reservas detail demonstrates owner mapping (Cuenta: ALEX MEDINA, Contacto: MARLENE CHAVEZ ESTEVES)
critical_code_review_comments: Security fix confirmed: All 3 comercial endpoints now require authentication (Depends(get_current_user) added)
Owner mapping via crm.v_partner_account_final is working correctly
Summary top_clientes groups by owner_partner_id (cuenta principal), not contact
Detail endpoint returns both owner (Cuenta) and contact (Contacto) fields for audit trail
Cliente search filter uses owner_partner_name ILIKE (line 58 in comercial.py)
Frontend ComercialPage.jsx correctly displays both Cuenta and Contacto columns in detail table
Frontend displays owner_partner_name (not partner_name) in Top 10 Clientes table
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data from crm.v_comercial_mov_flat view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner/cuenta principal mapping verified in Ventas y Reservas module. Summary endpoint groups top_clientes by owner_partner_id and returns owner_partner_name. Detail endpoint returns both owner_partner_name (Cuenta) and partner_name (Contacto) fields. Owner mapping demonstrated in RESERVA data where owner (ALEX MEDINA) differs from contact (MARLENE CHAVEZ ESTEVES). Authentication now required for all endpoints (security fix from iteration 17 is verified). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_comercial_owner.py (13 tests). Frontend verified via Playwright with screenshots.
